title: Data Integrity Failure - Tampered Session
goal: Modify session data to become admin.
owasp: A08:2025 - Software and Data Integrity Failures

whyVulnerable.explanation: The application trusted client-provided session data without verifying integrity.
whyVulnerable.answer: Client data must always be validated or signed.

steps: Application accepted session data from client.

secureFix.explanation: Sensitive data should be signed or verified using cryptographic integrity checks.
